info.title: Nolus Protocol Webapp API
info.description: Public REST API backing app.nolus.io. Read endpoints are cached and free to call; write endpoints return unsigned transaction payloads for client-side signing. Admin endpoints require API key auth and are intentionally omitted from this spec.

get.description:
Returns deduplicated assets with display prices from each primary protocol's
Oracle. Served from a background-refreshed cache (zero latency).

Returns a single asset with full details including per-protocol info and
Oracle prices.

404.description: Asset not found or not configured

get.description:
Returns visible balances (configured, non-ignored currencies) for a Nolus
wallet address along with aggregated USD value. Requires a `nolus1`-prefixed
bech32 address.

Returns all currently active zero-interest campaigns. Used by the frontend
to decide which lease/deposit actions to badge as zero-interest.

Checks whether a wallet/protocol/currency combination is eligible for any
zero-interest campaign and returns the matching campaigns.

Returns protocols, networks, the native asset, and top-level contracts in a
single payload. Served from a background-refreshed cache (zero latency).
Returns the networks section of the application configuration.
Returns the protocols section of the application configuration.

200.description: Protocol map keyed by protocol name

get.description:
Returns supported currencies with metadata, LPNs, lease-able tickers, and
alias map. Served from cache.
Looks up a currency by key (`TICKER@PROTOCOL`) or plain ticker.

post.description:
Returns unsigned CosmWasm execute messages to deposit funds into an earn
pool. The client fills in the sender address and denom before signing.

get.description:
Returns every configured earn pool with current APY, utilization, available
liquidity, and remaining deposit capacity. Served from a background-refreshed
cache and filtered by gated configuration.

Returns details for a specific pool identified by protocol key. Returns 404
if the protocol is not configured in gated config.

get.summary: Get earn positions for an owner
get.description:
Returns all earn positions across configured pools for the given address,
plus aggregated total in USD. Unconfigured protocols are filtered out.

Returns aggregated earn metrics: total value locked, active pool count,
average APY, and the dispatcher rewards rate. TVL and pool data come from
ETL; the dispatcher rewards rate comes from on-chain (optional).

post.description:
Returns unsigned CosmWasm execute messages to burn nLPN receipt tokens and
withdraw the underlying LPN value from an earn pool.

get.description:
Aggregates loan stats endpoints into one response, served from
background-refreshed cache. Each field is an opaque ETL passthrough.

Aggregates several ETL stats endpoints into one response, served from
background-refreshed cache. Each field is an opaque ETL passthrough.

Aggregates earnings, realized PnL, and position debt for an address in
parallel. Each field is an opaque ETL passthrough.

Aggregates history stats and realized PnL data for an address in parallel.
Each field is an opaque ETL passthrough.

post.description:
Opaque passthrough to the ETL `/subscribe` endpoint. Request and response
bodies are opaque JSON — shapes are not fixed in this spec.

get.description:
Fetches raw transactions from the ETL `/api/txs` endpoint, filters
user-initiated message types, and inserts a decoded `data` field per
transaction by decoding the protobuf `value`. Each entry is otherwise an
opaque ETL passthrough — shape is not fixed in this spec.

Forwards GET requests to the upstream ETL API for a fixed allowlist of
paths. Query parameters are passed through verbatim. Response is an opaque
ETL API passthrough — shape is not fixed in this spec.

Returns accepted fee denoms with their minimum gas prices plus the gas
estimate multiplier used by the app.

Returns the raw auth account object for an address, used to detect vesting
accounts and derive spendable balances.

Combines annual inflation and staking-pool bonded tokens so the frontend can
render a staking APR figure.

Returns bank-module metadata (units, display, description) for a denom, or
`null` if the chain has no metadata registered for it.
Returns proposal IDs that should be hidden in the UI (curated via gated config).

503.description: Gated config cache not yet populated

get.description: Returns quorum / threshold / veto-threshold parameters used to decide proposals.

Returns governance proposals in reverse-chronological order. For proposals
in the voting period, the live tally is fetched; if `voter` is supplied,
each such proposal is annotated with whether that address has voted.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of proposals to return (defaults to 10).

parameters.name: voter
parameters.description: Voter address — when supplied, each voting-period proposal is annotated with `voted`.

get.description: Returns the current (live) tally for a proposal.

get.summary: Get a voter's vote for a proposal
get.description:
Returns the vote cast by `voter` on `proposal_id`, or `null` if the voter
has not voted on this proposal.

200.description: Vote (nullable if voter has not voted)

get.description: Returns the total bonded / not-bonded token supply — used to compute quorum and APR.

Returns status, version and uptime. Fast, in-process — does not touch any
external services.

Performs live connectivity checks to upstream services (ETL, Nolus RPC/REST,
Skip, referral, zero-interest) in parallel and reports cache-warm status.
Slower than `/api/health` — intended for monitoring rather than load
balancer probes.

post.description:
Generates an Intercom-compatible JWT for the given wallet address. All
portfolio attributes (balance, leases, earn, staking, vesting) are fetched
server-side and embedded in the token — the client only supplies the
wallet address and type.

get.description:
Returns all leases for a given Nolus owner address, optionally filtered to a
single protocol. Leases from non-configured protocols and assets blocked by
gated restrictions (`ignore_all`, `ignore_long`, `ignore_short`) are omitted.

post.description:
Returns unsigned `MsgExecuteContract` messages to fully close the specified
lease position (full close of collateral).

get.summary: Get lease configuration for a protocol
get.description:
Returns downpayment ranges and minimum asset/transaction amounts used to
validate lease-open requests. Served from background-refreshed cache.

post.description:
Returns unsigned `MsgExecuteContract` messages that market-close the lease
by selling collateral to repay the outstanding debt.

Returns unsigned `MsgExecuteContract` messages that the frontend wallet will
complete (sender, IBC denom) and sign to open a new lease.

Queries the Leaser contract for the borrow amount and annual interest rate
that would result from opening a lease with the given downpayment.

Returns unsigned `MsgExecuteContract` messages to repay the specified amount
toward an existing lease.

get.description:
Returns full details for the specified lease. The `protocol` query parameter
is required — the backend cannot infer it from the address alone and a wrong
default would produce incorrect data for Short positions.

400.description: Missing or invalid protocol query parameter

get.description:
Returns the on-chain action history (open, repay, close, liquidation) for a
lease, sourced from the ETL indexer. Returns an empty list if no history is
available.

Returns the i18n translation blob for the requested language code. The
response is an opaque JSON object keyed by translation keys — shape is not
fixed in this spec.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Language code (e.g. `en`, `de`, `es`). Max 5 chars, alphanumeric + hyphen.

get.description:
Returns all networks that pass the gated propagation filter (fully
configured RPC/LCD/gas). Served from a background-refreshed cache.

Returns assets available on a specific network, with prices taken from the
network's primary protocol when configured, else any available protocol.

404.description: Network not found or not configured

get.description:
Returns a single network's configuration (endpoints, prefix, gas,
explorer, primary protocol).

404.description: Network not found or not configured

get.summary: List LPP pools on a network
get.description:
Returns LPP (Liquidity Pool) info for all configured protocols on the given
network, with APR, utilization, and supply/borrow totals from ETL.

404.description: Network not found or not configured

get.description:
Returns protocols filtered to a specific network and whose LPN currency is
configured for display.

404.description: Network not found or not configured

get.description:
Returns the chain software version and network identifier reported by the
node's ABCI info endpoint.
Returns latest block height/time and sync state for the Nolus RPC node.

Returns current USD prices for all supported currencies, aggregated from
on-chain Oracle contracts.

Returns the registry of Nolus DeFi sub-protocols (active and deprecated)
with contract addresses and lease/LPN metadata.
Returns only protocols where `is_active` is `true`.

200.description: Map of active protocols keyed by name

get.description:
Returns all protocols that pass the gated propagation filter (configured
network, LPN, and currencies). Served from a background-refreshed cache.

Returns currencies available on a given protocol with protocol-specific
Oracle prices. Filtered by currency display config and lease-rules asset
restrictions (`ignore_all`, `ignore_long`, `ignore_short`).

404.description: Protocol not found or not configured

post.description:
Links `referred_wallet` to the referrer that owns `referral_code`. Fails if
the wallet already has a referrer, the code is unknown, or the wallet is
trying to self-refer.

502.description: Referral service error or not configured (including already-assigned / self-referral conflicts)

get.description: Returns paginated payouts for the referrer, with optional status filter.

502.description: Referral service error or not configured

get.description: Returns paginated referrals (referred wallets) attached to this referrer.

502.description: Referral service error or not configured

post.description:
Registers the supplied wallet as a referrer and returns its referral code.
Responds with `201 Created` for new registrations and `200 OK` when the
wallet is already registered (idempotent).

502.description: Referral service error or not configured

get.description: Returns paginated rewards earned by the referrer, with optional status filter.

502.description: Referral service error or not configured

get.description:
Returns aggregated stats (totals, pending rewards, bonuses) for the
referrer identified by `address`.

502.description: Referral service error or not configured

get.description:
Public endpoint — checks whether `code` is a live referral code and returns
the owning referrer's wallet if so.

502.description: Referral service error or not configured

post.description:
Returns unsigned `MsgWithdrawDelegatorReward` messages, one per validator
address supplied.

Returns an unsigned `MsgDelegate` for client-side signing. The delegator
address is filled in by the frontend before broadcast.

get.description:
Returns the chain's staking module parameters (unbonding time, max
validators, bond denom, etc.).

get.summary: Get staking positions for a delegator
get.description:
Returns all delegations, unbonding entries, and pending rewards for a
delegator address, with aggregated totals.

post.description: Returns an unsigned `MsgBeginRedelegate` for moving stake between validators.
Returns an unsigned `MsgUndelegate` for client-side signing.

get.description:
Returns the validator set (bonded and non-bonded), served from a
background-refreshed cache for zero latency.
Looks up a validator by its operator address (`nolusvaloper1...`).

Proxies Skip `/v2/info/chains`. Response is an opaque Skip API
passthrough — shape is not fixed in this spec.

parameters.name: include_evm
parameters.description: Include EVM chains in the response.

parameters.name: include_svm
parameters.description: Include SVM chains in the response.

200.description: Opaque Skip API passthrough (list of chains)

get.description:
Returns UI-only swap configuration (blacklist, defaults, transfers) from
background-refreshed cache. Response is an opaque JSON object — shape is
not fixed in this spec.

post.description:
Enriches the slim request with slippage, timeout, and affiliates from
gated config, then forwards to Skip API. Response is an opaque Skip API
passthrough — shape is not fixed in this spec.

Enriches the slim request with gated swap config (affiliates, venues,
bridges) and forwards to Skip API. Response is an opaque Skip API
passthrough — shape is not fixed in this spec.

get.description:
Forwards to Skip API `/v2/tx/status`. Response is an opaque Skip API
passthrough — shape is not fixed in this spec.

parameters.name: tx_hash
parameters.description: Transaction hash to query status for

parameters.name: chain_id
parameters.description: Chain ID the transaction lives on (e.g. `osmosis-1`)

post.description: Registers a transaction with Skip for cross-chain status tracking.

get.description: Returns whether the zero-interest feature is enabled, payment bounds, and supported denoms.

Checks whether the given lease/owner pair is eligible for a zero-interest
payment and returns the allowed maximum amount.

parameters.name: lease
parameters.description: Lease contract address being checked for zero-interest eligibility.

get.summary: Get zero-interest payments for a lease
get.description: Returns the zero-interest payments recorded against a specific lease.

post.description:
Creates a signed zero-interest payment and submits it for processing. The
owner must sign the request; the backend forwards to the payments manager.

get.description: Returns all zero-interest payments (pending or completed) owned by `owner`.

delete.description: Cancels a pending zero-interest payment. The owner must sign the request.

account.description: Raw account object returned by the chain (shape depends on account type: base, vesting, module).

all_eligible_currencies.description: All currencies eligible across any campaign

all_eligible_protocols.description: All protocols eligible across any campaign

has_universal_campaign.description: True if any campaign has no restrictions

AssetDetailResponse.description: Response for single asset with full details

price.description: Price in USD (from primary protocol for display)

networks.description: Networks where this asset is available

AssetResponse.description: Single asset with display info and price

price.description: Price in USD from primary protocol's Oracle

networks.description: Networks where this asset is available

protocols.description: Protocols where this asset can be traded

CurrencyDisplayInfo.description:
Currency display information for API responses

This is the canonical type for currency display info across all handlers.
The `color` field is optional and will be omitted from JSON if None.

CurrencyInfo.description: Currency information with all details needed by frontend

DetailedHealthResponse.description: Detailed health response with service checks

total_value_locked.description: Total value locked across all pools (USD)

messages.description: Unsigned CosmWasm execute messages for client-side signing

field.description: Field name that failed validation (when applicable).

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.

retry_after.description: Number of seconds the client should wait before retrying (rate-limit responses).

GasFeeConfigResponse.description:
Gas fee configuration served to the frontend.
Replaces the direct ABCI query to `/nolus.tax.v2.Query/Params` from the browser.

gas_prices.description: Map of denom -> min gas price (e.g., "ibc/..." -> "0.003")

IntercomTokenRequest.description:
Request for Intercom JWT token generation
Only wallet address and type are needed — all portfolio data is fetched server-side

IntercomTokenResponse.description:
Response containing JWT token for Intercom
Matches beacon's API response: { token: "..." }

LeaseConfigResponse.description: Response for lease configuration per protocol

collateral_symbol.description: Collateral symbol (e.g., "USDC_NOBLE" or "ALL_BTC") — determines downpayment decimals

lpn_price.description: LPN price at opening (for short positions)

oneOf.description: Opening state info (for leases still opening)

LoansStatsBatch.description: Batch response for loans stats (raw JSON passthrough)

MessagesRequest.description: Slim messages request from frontend — backend injects slippage, timeout, affiliates

operations.description: Route operations from Skip `/route`. Opaque — passed through verbatim.

native.description: Whether this is the native (Nolus) network

ProposalResponse.description: Proposal response with tally and vote info

messages.description: Raw governance messages attached to this proposal (shape depends on proposal type).

ProtocolAssetDetail.description: Asset details specific to a protocol

ProtocolContracts.description:
Protocol contract addresses used in API responses

This is the canonical type for protocol contracts in handler responses.
All fields are optional because not all protocols have all contract types.

ProtocolCurrencyResponse.description: Currency with protocol-specific info and price

RouteRequest.description: Slim route request from frontend — backend injects all Skip config

network.description: Optional network hint to filter swap venues (e.g., "osmosis")

ServiceStatus.description: Health status of a single service

messages.description: Unsigned Cosmos SDK messages for client-side signing

StatsOverviewBatch.description: Batch response for stats overview page (raw JSON passthrough)

TrackRequest.description: Request to track a swap transaction on Skip.

chain_id.description: Chain ID the transaction was submitted to

UserDashboardBatch.description: Batch response for user dashboard data (raw JSON passthrough)

UserHistoryBatch.description: Batch response for user history page (raw JSON passthrough)

amount.description: Amount in nLPN to withdraw (receipt tokens)
